customer_name.evidence: Agent: Pura naam kya rahega sir? Customer: Vishal Arora.

age.evidence: Customer: Mam right now main 33 ka hun.

gender.evidence: Agent: Haanji madam. (Agent mistakenly addressed customer as madam initially, but customer identified as male later) Agent: 33 ke ho. Aur aap professionally karte kya hain? Customer: Mam main salaried hun. (Customer uses male gender markers in Hindi)

temperature.evidence: Customer: Chalo bataiye plan bataiye, main free bhi hun.

objections.quote: Main chah raha hun mam term plan separate ho aur investment plan separate ho.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Main R&D kar leta hun. Aap mujhe isi number pe detail de dijiye. Main ek baar Google pe ek baar workout kar leta hun.

primary_goal.evidence: Customer: Mam guaranteed, guaranteed chahiye mujhe.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Main Sunday free hun mam, Sunday free. (Implies he is the one to decide)

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer explicitly requested separate term and investment products with guaranteed returns, whereas the agent pitched a combined ULIP.
missed_opportunities: Did not offer a specific guaranteed savings plan or separate term plan options during the call.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is interested in exploring options and agreed to a callback, though he prefers separate term and investment products.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced a new Tata AIA term plus ULIP plan, and the customer agreed to hear the details.
call_narrative.customer_response: Engaged and inquisitive, asking clarifying questions about the product structure.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer expressed a preference for separate term and investment products with guaranteed returns, shifting the conversation away from the initial ULIP pitch.
call_narrative.ending: Agent agreed to call back on Sunday after confirming the customer's name.

key_quotes: Main chah raha hun mam term plan separate ho aur investment plan separate ho.
Main R&D kar leta hun. Aap mujhe isi number pe detail de dijiye.
